# services.system76-scheduler

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.system76-scheduler`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.system76-scheduler.assignments` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Process profile assignments. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.assignments.<name>.class` | `null or one of "idle", "batch", "other", "rr", "fifo"` | CPU scheduler class. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.assignments.<name>.ioClass` | `null or one of "idle", "best-effort", "realtime"` | IO scheduler class. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.assignments.<name>.ioPrio` | `null or integer between 0 and 7 (both inclusive)` | IO scheduler priority. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.assignments.<name>.matchers` | `null or (list of string)` | Process matchers. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.assignments.<name>.nice` | `null or integer between -20 and 19 (both inclusive)` | Niceness. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.assignments.<name>.prio` | `null or integer between 1 and 99 (both inclusive)` | CPU scheduler priority. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable system76-scheduler. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.exceptions` | `list of string` | Processes that are left alone. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.package` | `package` | Which System76-Scheduler package to use. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.cfsProfiles.default.bandwidth-size` | `signed integer` | `sched_cfs_bandwidth_slice_us`. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.cfsProfiles.default.latency` | `signed integer` | `sched_latency_ns`. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.cfsProfiles.default.nr-latency` | `signed integer` | `sched_nr_latency`. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.cfsProfiles.default.preempt` | `one of "none", "voluntary", "full"` | Preemption mode. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.cfsProfiles.default.wakeup-granularity` | `floating point number` | `sched_wakeup_granularity_ns`. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.cfsProfiles.enable` | `boolean` | Tweak CFS latency parameters when going on/off battery |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.cfsProfiles.responsive.bandwidth-size` | `signed integer` | `sched_cfs_bandwidth_slice_us`. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.cfsProfiles.responsive.latency` | `signed integer` | `sched_latency_ns`. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.cfsProfiles.responsive.nr-latency` | `signed integer` | `sched_nr_latency`. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.cfsProfiles.responsive.preempt` | `one of "none", "voluntary", "full"` | Preemption mode. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.cfsProfiles.responsive.wakeup-granularity` | `floating point number` | `sched_wakeup_granularity_ns`. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.enable` | `boolean` | Tweak scheduling of individual processes in real time. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.background.class` | `null or one of "idle", "batch", "other", "rr", "fifo"` | CPU scheduler class. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.background.ioClass` | `null or one of "idle", "best-effort", "realtime"` | IO scheduler class. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.background.ioPrio` | `null or integer between 0 and 7 (both inclusive)` | IO scheduler priority. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.background.matchers` | `null or (list of string)` | Process matchers. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.background.nice` | `null or integer between -20 and 19 (both inclusive)` | Niceness. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.background.prio` | `null or integer between 1 and 99 (both inclusive)` | CPU scheduler priority. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.enable` | `boolean` | Boost foreground process priorities. (And de-boost background ones). Note that this option needs cooperation from the desktop environment to work. On Gnome the client side is implemented by the "System76 Scheduler" shell extension. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.foreground.class` | `null or one of "idle", "batch", "other", "rr", "fifo"` | CPU scheduler class. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.foreground.ioClass` | `null or one of "idle", "best-effort", "realtime"` | IO scheduler class. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.foreground.ioPrio` | `null or integer between 0 and 7 (both inclusive)` | IO scheduler priority. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.foreground.matchers` | `null or (list of string)` | Process matchers. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.foreground.nice` | `null or integer between -20 and 19 (both inclusive)` | Niceness. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.foregroundBoost.foreground.prio` | `null or integer between 1 and 99 (both inclusive)` | CPU scheduler priority. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.pipewireBoost.enable` | `boolean` | Boost Pipewire client priorities. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.pipewireBoost.profile.class` | `null or one of "idle", "batch", "other", "rr", "fifo"` | CPU scheduler class. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.pipewireBoost.profile.ioClass` | `null or one of "idle", "best-effort", "realtime"` | IO scheduler class. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.pipewireBoost.profile.ioPrio` | `null or integer between 0 and 7 (both inclusive)` | IO scheduler priority. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.pipewireBoost.profile.matchers` | `null or (list of string)` | Process matchers. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.pipewireBoost.profile.nice` | `null or integer between -20 and 19 (both inclusive)` | Niceness. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.pipewireBoost.profile.prio` | `null or integer between 1 and 99 (both inclusive)` | CPU scheduler priority. |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.refreshInterval` | `signed integer` | Process list poll interval, in seconds |
| `services.system76-scheduler.settings.processScheduler.useExecsnoop` | `boolean` | Use execsnoop (otherwise poll the precess list periodically). |
| `services.system76-scheduler.useStockConfig` | `boolean` | Use the (reasonable and featureful) stock configuration. When this option is `true`, `services.system76-scheduler.settings` are ignored. |
